title: entitlement-and-milestone-designer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the entitlement-and-milestone-designer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

sla_summary.description: Example from AGENT.md: "Gold tier: 2h response, 8h resolution, 24x7; Silver: 4h/24h, 9x5 business hours; renewal clock resets per-case" Required column: 'design'.
sla_summary.example: "Gold tier: 2h response, 8h resolution, 24x7; Silver: 4h/24h, 9x5 business hours; renewal clock resets per-case"

tier_count.description: Example from AGENT.md: integer — number of SLA tiers to model Required column: 'design'.
tier_count.example: integer — number of SLA tiers to model
